---
title: "Introduction to R and RStudio"
subtitle: "Installation, Setup, and Basics"
author: "Orville D. Hombrebueno"
date: "January 28, 2026"
institute: "Nueva Vizcaya State University"
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: "pics/rnvsu.jpeg"
  data-background-size: 110%
  data-background-opacity: "0.3"
format:
  revealjs:
    css: styles.css
    logo: pics/rcnvsu-nb.png
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## What is R?

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XcBLEVknqvY width="115%" height="75%" >}}

## What is RStudio?

RStudio is an integrated development environment (IDE) for R and Python designed to help you be more productive in your daily data science work.

[![](pics/engine.png)](https://moderndive.com/1-getting-started.html)

## What are we going to do?

1. Install [R](https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/).
2. Install [RStudio](https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/).
3. Lets get our hands dirty with R and [RStudio](https://docs.posit.co/ide/user/).👨🏽‍💻
4. Resources in learning R.
